## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / entity
- [ ] New device model (`models.py`)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `strings.json` and every `translations/*.json` stay key-for-key in sync (if UI strings changed)
- [ ] `manifest.json` key order follows hassfest; `version` bumped if this is a release
- [ ] Tested on hardware, or explicitly noted as untested
